✦
tap the envelope to read your letter

Hi baby!,

Happy 18th birthday, Ennah! 🥳🎉 Pwede na gyud ka makulong tehh... djkkk HAHAHA. Kidding aside, I know you don't really celebrate birthdays because of your beliefs, but I still wanted to greet you today. I hope you don't mind. Do you remember when you greeted me exactly at 12:00 AM on October 26? 😭 HAHAHA. I seriously didn't expect that at all. Out of everyone, ikaw pa gyud ang pinakaunang nag-greet sa akoa. I was just sitting there thinking, "Damn... does she like me already? Or delulu lang gyud ko?" 😂 But regardless of what I thought back then, I was genuinely grateful. Even though I kept saying I didn't want birthday greetings, the fact that you remembered and stayed up to greet me meant more than I could ever explain.

Happy birthday again, Euthenna. 🥰 Looking back now, it's honestly funny how everything turned out. I never imagined that this girl would one day become my girlfriend. It's still surreal to me sometimes. I always liked you and secretly hoped that maybe, just maybe, you'd become part of my life. But at the same time, I also wanted to respect your religion and your beliefs. I never wanted to force anything or make you uncomfortable. That's why I was content with simply admiring you from afar, even if it meant keeping my feelings to myself.

Yet somehow, life surprised me in the best way possible. The girl I prayed for, admired, and cared about is now the person I get to call mine(yiee kilig nayan sya). Thank you for loving me, for trusting me, and for choosing me despite all my flaws. I hope this new chapter of your life as an 18-year-old brings you peace, happiness, good health, and countless blessings. I'll continue doing my best to become someone who deserves your love every single day. Once again, happy 18th birthday BABYYYY. Iloveeuuuusoooomuchhh. May Allah continue to guide you in everything you do.🤲🏻🙇🏻

Always yours — forever your CRAZY MAN 🤍
